title: Someone Tell Lloyd Blankfein The Fire In Private Credit Has Already Started
summary:
Someone Tell Lloyd Blankfein The Fire In Private Credit Has Already Started

            Submitted by QTR's Fringe Finance

As I’ve been writing about, private credit has been under immense stress for months, with liquidity strains, redemption pressure, and growing questions around valuations all surfacing at once. And now with things on the verge of imminent collapse and literally all of f*cking Wall Street already on notice, one former major banking CEO has decided to offer up the King Solomon
summary_ko: 개인 신용 시장에서 이미 불이 시작되었다는 내용의 기사이다. 개인 신용 시장은 이미 큰 스트레스를 받고 있으며, 이는 금융 시장에 큰 영향을 미칠 수 있다.

title: STAT+: China’s biotech boom is rewriting everything
summary: In today's Readout newsletter, how China's biotech boom is rewriting everything and how an NIH crackdown is disrupting global science collaboration.
summary_ko: 중국의 바이오테크 산업이 급성장하고 있다. 중국의 바이오테크 붐은 모든 것을 재정의하고 있다.

title: Novartis targets Xolair successor in buyout of startup Excellergy
summary: Worth up to $2 billion, the deal is centered around a drug that could lead to faster and more complete control of allergic conditions than Novartis and Roche’s popular medicine.
summary_ko: 노바티스는 엑셀러지社를 인수하여 알레르기 치료제를 개발 중이다.

title: AstraZeneca’s in vivo CAR-T bet eradicates cancer in 3 of 5 patients, but death mars dataset
summary: AstraZeneca isn’t letting a death in a China trial detract from the potential of its $1 billion in vivo bet, even as the candidate’s safety and efficacy profile have so far failed to separate it from traditional CAR-T therapies.
summary_ko: 아스트라제네카의 인 비보 CAR-T 치료제가 5명 중 3명의 환자에서 암을 완치하였지만, 1명의 사망 사례가 보고되었다.

title: Iran Threatens Industrial Sites Across Gulf-Region After Its Nuclear & Largest Steel Plants Attacked
summary:
Iran Threatens Industrial Sites Across Gulf-Region After Its Nuclear & Largest Steel Plants Attacked

            Summary


	No pause from Tehran, war footing deepens: Iran denies requesting Donald Trump’s 10-day halt; Israel attacks steel & industrial sites. Also, Khondab Heavy Water Research Reactor, part of the Arak Nuclear Complex, targeted. Yellow Cake factory in Yazd province hit.
	
	
	Escalation on all fronts: IRGC HQ targeted by US-Israsel; Iran signals expansion by naming UAE targets, h
summary_ko: 이란은 핵 시설과钢鉄 공장을 공격받은 후 걸프 지역의 산업 시설을 위협하고 있다. 이란은 전쟁 준비를 강화하고 있다.

title: Otsuka picks up PTSD drug with $700M Transcend buy
summary: The buyout, which includes another $525 million in floated payouts, hands Otsuka a medicine it sees as a possibly “paradigm-shifting therapy” in psychiatry.
summary_ko: 오쓰카가 PTSD 치료제를 개발 중인 트랜스센드社를 7억 달러에 인수했다.

title: FDA clears Denali drug in ‘clear step’ for rare disease biotechs
summary: The approval of Denali’s Hunter syndrome treatment, Avlayah, comes after a series of drug rejections and delays that had led to criticism of the FDA’s stance on rare disease therapies.
summary_ko: FDA가 데날리의 헌터 증후군 치료제를 승인함으로써, 드문 질병 치료제 개발에 대한 기대가 높아지고 있다.

title: Sarepta sees early success with RNAi drugs from Arrowhead
summary: Long-awaited results from Phase 1/2 studies lifted Sarepta’s stock and, according to the company, suggest potential for two medicines to treat muscle-weakening conditions.
summary_ko: 사레프타의 RNAi 치료제가 초기 성공을 거두었으며, 근육 약화 질환 치료에 잠재력을 보여주었다.

title: Novartis pens $2B deal for allergy biotech with potential Xolair successor
summary: Novartis has penned a $2 billion deal for a biotech whose next-gen anti-IgE program could offer a worthy successor to Xolair.
summary_ko: 노바티스는 알러지 바이오테크 회사와 20억 달러의 계약을 체결했다. 이는 노바티스의 알러지 치료제 개발에 큰 역할을 할 것으로 기대된다.

title: Scientists turn pig semen extract into eye drops that kill cancer in mice
summary: The human eye is like an immunological fortress, with its ability to exclude unwanted intruders a boon when preventing infection but a burden when trying to deliver vital medicines. Researchers in China have now turned to an unusual source—pig semen—to develop eye drops that can deliver cancer drugs to the back of the eye.
summary_ko: 과학자들이 돼지 정자 추출물을 이용하여 눈 질환을 치료하는 안약을 개발하였다.

title: AstraZeneca lung drug gets ‘surprise’ win in COPD trials
summary: The treatment, tozorakimab, succeeded where other similar therapies failed and could help a broader group of COPD patients than Dupixent.
summary_ko: 아스트라제네카의 폐질환 치료제 토조라키마브(Tozorakimab)가 임상 시험에서 성공을 거두었습니다. 이는 더 많은 폐질환 환자에게 도움이 될 수 있습니다.

title: Musk Targets Retail Investors For Up To 30% Of SpaceX's IPO Shares
summary:
Musk Targets Retail Investors For Up To 30% Of SpaceX's IPO Shares

            Elon Musk is planning a highly unconventional IPO for SpaceX, aiming to make it one of the largest public offerings ever, with a target raise in the tens of billions, according to the Wall Street Journal.

Instead of relying solely on the standard investor roadshow, he is considering bringing investors directly to SpaceX sites, where they could tour facilities and potentially witness rocket launches—turning the pitch
summary_ko: 엘론 머스크가 스페이스X의 IPO에서 소매 투자자에게 최대 30%의 주식을 할당할 계획입니다.
korea_search_query: IPO OR 상장 우주항공 OR 우주산업

title: Frozen Does Not Mean Stable: Rethinking Cryopreservation in Cell and Gene Therapy Manufacturing
summary:
As cell-based therapies grow more complex and manufacturing networks expand, resilience can’t be an afterthought, and cryopreservation can no longer just be a step that gets validated during development and left alone. It needs to play an ongoing role in product consistency, potency, and reliability.
The post Frozen Does Not Mean Stable: Rethinking Cryopreservation in Cell and Gene Therapy Manufacturing appeared first on MedCity News.
summary_ko: 세포 및 유전자 치료 제조에서 동결 보존의 한계를 재고하는 필요성이 제기되었습니다. 이는 세포 기반 치료가 더 복잡해지고 제조 네트워크가 확장됨에 따라 회복력과 안정성이 중요해지고 있습니다.

title: Soaring Prices Set To Crash China's LNG Imports To 8-Year Low
summary:
Soaring Prices Set To Crash China's LNG Imports To 8-Year Low

            Submitted by Tsvetana Paraskova of OilPrice.com

Surging LNG prices amid the war in the Middle East are set to lead to the lowest monthly LNG imports into China in eight years as Qatari and UAE supply is off the market and Chinese buyers look to raise supply from domestic gas production and pipeline deliveries.

China is on track to import about 3.7 million tons of LNG in March, per tanker-tracking data by Kpler cited by
summary_ko: 중국의 LNG 수입이 8년 만에 최저치로 떨어질 것으로 예상됩니다. 이는 중동 전쟁으로 인한 LNG 가격 상승의 영향입니다.

title: Why Agentic AI is Useful But Limited & Other Hot Takes on the AI Market
summary:
Fawad Butt, CEO of Penguin Ai, gave his candid thoughts on where the healthcare AI market is headed, including how data leakage could be fueling smarter AI models and the limits of agentic AI in enterprise settings.
The post Why Agentic AI is Useful But Limited & Other Hot Takes on the AI Market appeared first on MedCity News.
summary_ko: 펭귄 AI의 CEO는 의료 인공지능 시장에 대한 자신의 생각을 공유했으며, 데이터 누출이 더智能한 AI 모델을 구축하는 데 사용될 수 있으며, 엔터프라이즈 환경에서 에이전트 AI의 한계를 강조했습니다.

title: Novartis to spend up to $2B on Excellergy and its next-gen Xolair candidate
summary: With its blockbuster drug Xolair set to face biosimilar competition, Novartis said it will pay up to $2 billion in upfront and certain milestone payments to take Excellergy and its IgE ...
summary_ko: 노바티스는 Excellergy와 그 차세대 Xolair 후보물질에 대해 최대 20억 달러를 지불하기로 했다.

title: US Deploys Ukrainian-Style Drone Boat In Iran War As AI Weapons Race Accelerates
summary:
US Deploys Ukrainian-Style Drone Boat In Iran War As AI Weapons Race Accelerates 

            The Department of War confirmed to Reuters that it deployed Ukrainian-style drone boats to the Middle East as part of Operation Epic Fury against Iran. This move signals that the DoW is quickly learning a major lesson from the four-year Russia-Ukraine war: inexpensive autonomous systems, from drone boats to kamikaze drones, are necessary and are becoming core assets (very cheap) on the modern battlefie
summary_ko: 미국은 우크라이나 스타일의 드론 보트를 이란 전쟁에 배치했다. 이는 AI 무기 경쟁이 가속화되는 중이다.

title: AstraZeneca delivers dream result as phase 3 COPD hits breathe life into class rocked by flops
summary: AstraZeneca’s chronic obstructive pulmonary disease drug candidate has hit the mark in a pair of phase 3 trials, delivering broad efficacy with a mechanism that yielded mixed data for Roche and Sanofi.
summary_ko: 아스트라제네카의 만성 폐쇄성 폐질환 치료법이 3상 임상시험에서 긍정적인 결과를 보였다.

title: Otsuka buys Transcend Therapeutics for $700M upfront
summary:
Otsuka is buying neuropsychiatric drugmaker Transcend Therapeutics in a deal worth roughly $1.2 billion, further bolstering a class of drugs that are supposed to provide the therapeutic benefits of psychedelics without the trip.

 As part ...
summary_ko: 오쓰카가 신경정신 약물 회사인 Transcend Therapeutics를 7억 달러의 선불금으로 인수했다. 이 거래는 약 12억 달러에 달하며, 신경정신 약물의 치료적 이점을 제공하는 약물의 클래스를 더욱 강화한다.

title: FDA approves Rocket's gene therapy for ultra-rare immune disease
summary:
A rare disease gene therapy from Rocket Pharmaceuticals has garnered FDA approval after an earlier rejection for manufacturing problems.

 The FDA on Thursday granted accelerated approval to Rocket Pharma’s gene therapy ...
summary_ko: FDA가 Rocket의 유전자 치료법을 극소수 면역 질환에 대해 승인했다.

title: AstraZeneca’s in vivo CAR-T led to early responses, but one death in China trial
summary: New clinical trial data on the in vivo CAR-T therapy that AstraZeneca acquired last year suggest that while the experimental treatment can curb multiple myeloma in some patients, it may not be safer than the ...
summary_ko: AstraZeneca의 in vivo CAR-T 치료법이 초기 반응을 보였지만, 중국 임상 시험에서 1명의 사망자가 발생했다.

title: Top HHS official makes impassioned pitch to take on China biotech
summary:
Senior HHS official and head of Medicare Chris Klomp didn't mince words when he called competition with China’s ascending biotech industry “a war.”

 Klomp’s comments, made Thursday at the annual Conservative Political Action Conference in ...
summary_ko: 미국 보건복지부 고위官이 중국의 바이오테크 산업과의 경쟁을 강조하며 미국의 바이오테크 산업을 강화해야 한다고 주장했습니다.

title: FDA Approval for Denali Therapeutics Blazes a New Trail for Brain-Penetrating Drugs
summary:
Denali Therapeutics’ Avlayah received FDA approval for treating Hunter syndrome, a rare neurological disorder. The biologic medicine uses Denali’s proprietary drug delivery technology to cross the protective blood-brain barrier. 
The post FDA Approval for Denali Therapeutics Blazes a New Trail for Brain-Penetrating Drugs appeared first on MedCity News.
summary_ko: Denali Therapeutics의 Avlayah가 FDA 승인을 받아 헌터 증후군 치료를 위한 새로운 길을 열었습니다. 이 생물학적 약물은 뇌를 관통하는 데 사용되는 Denali의 독점적인 약물 전달 기술을 사용합니다.

title: Otsuka buys Transcend in $1.2B deal, nabbing MDMA analog for psychiatric conditions
summary: Otsuka Pharmaceutical has acquired Transcend Therapeutics for $700 million upfront through its wholly owned subsidiary, Otsuka America, in a deal that could also deliver up to $525 million in milestone payments tied to assets in development.
summary_ko: 오츠카 제약이 Transcend Therapeutics를 12억 달러에 인수했다. 이 인수는 정신과 질환 치료를 위한 MDMA 유사체 개발에 중점을 두고 있다.

title: Philips AI cath lab copilot nets FDA clearance
summary: Developed with Edwards Lifesciences, DeviceGuide is aimed at the challenging task of transcatheter mitral valve repair.
summary_ko: 필립스의 AI 기반 카테터 실험실 협력 로봇이 FDA의 승인을 받았다.

title: AnaptysBio spins out biotech operations; Affibody's data in hidradenitis suppurativa
summary:
Plus, news about Zenas and Ysios Capital:

 🌀 AnaptysBio's spinout: The independent public company, called First Tracks Biotherapeutics, is expected to start trading on April 20. It will launch with ...
summary_ko: AnaptysBio가 바이오테크 사업을 분사하고, Affibody의 hidradenitis suppurativa 데이터가 공개되었다.

title: FDA approves Novo Nordisk's once-weekly insulin
summary:
The FDA finally greenlit Novo Nordisk’s once-weekly insulin for type 2 diabetes, making it the first US-approved longer-acting alternative to daily basal treatment for this indication.

 The Thursday approval of the ...
summary_ko: FDA가 Novo Nordisk의 일주일마다 투여하는 인슐린을 승인했다.

title: Taking a Page From Cancer Drugs, Autoimmune Biotech Alumis Aims for Precision Immunology
summary:
Alumis’s genomic research guided its development of envudeucitinib, a TYK2 inhibitor that some analysts now view as best in class. The Phase 3 results that will support a planned FDA submission in plaque psoriasis are scheduled for presentation this weekend during the American Academy of Dermatology annual meeting in Denver. 
The post Taking a Page From Cancer Drugs, Autoimmune Biotech Alumis Aims for Precision Immunology appeared first on MedCity News.
summary_ko: Alumis의 TYK2 억제제 envudeucitinib가 제3상 임상시험에서 긍정적인 결과를 보여주며 정밀 면역학 분야에서 새로운 기회를 열어줍니다.
emerging_sector: 정밀 면역학 및 자가면역 질환 치료

title: Democratizing Access: How Community Hospitals Can Drive the Next Wave of Robotic Bronchoscopy
summary:
As robotic systems grow more integrated, portable, and affordable, community hospitals will continue to play a leading role in redefining access to innovation.
The post Democratizing Access: How Community Hospitals Can Drive the Next Wave of Robotic Bronchoscopy appeared first on MedCity News.
summary_ko: 로봇 브로스코피 기술이 커뮤니티 병원에서 더 널리 사용되면서 의료 접근성을 높일 수 있을 것입니다.
